subcodes.first_line: By the life of God! The Afnán possess a station such that, should they cleave unto it, whatsoever they desire shall be made manifest and realized [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله از برای افنان مقامیست که اگر بآن تمسک نمایند آنچه را بخواهند مجری و ظاهر میشود
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
